label: Nominal day
summary: All modules nominal with one resource watch item in Elysium Pack.

label: Water pressure
summary: Water recovery falls below target in two modules and irrigation priority shifts.

label: Disease suspicion
summary: The crop agent flags a probable disease event in Noctis Stack bay 3.

label: Dust storm / power drop
summary: Regional dust reduces light and power, forcing environmental and resource compensation.

label: Harvest rush
summary: A tight harvest window increases astronaut workload and dispatch urgency.
